message.abstract:
<jats:title>Abstract</jats:title>
                <jats:sec>
                  <jats:title>Aims</jats:title>
                  <jats:p>This perspective is exploring the effect of residential aged care facility COVID-19 lockdowns on resident mortality.</jats:p>
                </jats:sec>
                <jats:sec>
                  <jats:title>Relevance</jats:title>
                  <jats:p>People living in residential aged care facilities (RACFs) are at increased risk of COVID-19 infection and death.</jats:p>
                  <jats:p>In Australia, COVID-19 infections in RACF residents represented seven percent of recorded infections and the case fatality rate (CFR) was 33%. RACFs were categorised as high-risk settings for COVID-19 and a number of measures to reduce the risk of acquiring COVID-19 were implemented at the National and State and Territory levels, such as strict infection control, monitoring, testing, vaccination and increased clinical capacity</jats:p>
                </jats:sec>
                <jats:sec>
                  <jats:title>Methods</jats:title>
                  <jats:p>All COVID-19 infections and deaths in the 12-months from 15 October 2021 to 14 October 2022 for the cohort of residents living in an Australian RACF (except Western Australia) at the beginning of this period were analysed.</jats:p>
                </jats:sec>
                <jats:sec>
                  <jats:title>Key points</jats:title>
                  <jats:list list-type="bullet">
                    <jats:list-item>
                      <jats:p>Lockdowns of RACFs were successful in substantially reducing the number of COVID-19 infections and deaths in RACF residents. This was largely because the infection and mortality rates of COVID-19 were high in 2020 and 2021.</jats:p>
                    </jats:list-item>
                    <jats:list-item>
                      <jats:p>The findings of this study could be used to evaluate and inform national and local states and territories’ guidelines on the management of COVID-19 in RACFs.</jats:p>
                    </jats:list-item>
                  </jats:list>
                </jats:sec>
title: The effect of residential aged care facility COVID-19 lockdowns on resident mortality

reference.article-title: Implications of COVID-19 for an ageing population
